meaning: vi.哗哗响,作嗖嗖声vt.嗖地发射n.哗哗作响的移动,嗖的一声
examples: A swoosh doesn't make it good design. It's just lazy.
A grey outside, the strong wind blew the window swoosh.
He was more interested in getting some sleep than talking some swoosh.
Notice in the above video that there are no Swoosh logos to be found.
It would be a wise decision to move from the Swoosh to the Jumpman.
